content.text: Both fixes are tiny. I'll commit both under the acme worktree to save time — the user said it doesn't matter which branch.

input.command: git -C /tmp/wt-4401 add platform_product/acme_simulator/forms.py tests/fixtures/acme_simulator/guarantee_matrix.json platform_product/nexus_brokers/managers.py tests/teatree_platform/test_nexus_broker_isolation.py && git -C /tmp/wt-4401 commit -m 'fix(acme_simulator): groundhold guarantee display and nexus broker isolation (4401 + 5372)'
input.description: commit both ticket changes on the acme branch
